title: SnapshotParams
description: Parameters for `tool.snapshot` — produce an indented accessibility tree for one tab plus a fresh `@e<N>` ref-store on the extension side (design §4 / §7).

max_depth.description: Cap the depth of the rendered tree (defense against very deep pages). Implementation-defined default; agents typically use `Some(16)` for "browse and read" prompts.

max_tokens.description: Soft cap on rendered tokens (approximate; extension uses a best-effort heuristic based on character count).

tab_id.description: Optional target tab. Defaults to the Agent Window's currently active tab.
